title: DiscoverCraft+
description: Experience a whole new Minecraft world with some RPG.
body:
## **No more updates** ## **DiscoverCraft+** ### **I recreated the modpack in version 2 so some mods/resource packs are removed and i add some new mods/resource packs.** **This modpack is full with many mods. There is Magic mods Technology mods World Generation Mods and many more. This modpack has many different mods you can focus on Technology Magic RPG or just explore the world.** ## **Is recommended to use 10048 Memory or more**
All the 200+ mods. Old Versions. - [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features). - [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures). - [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories). -
